brandVoice.text: Write de copy in a Formal register with a Trusted, Innovative, Customer-Centric voice. Keep messaging precise, technically trustworthy, and action-oriented for product UI and developer-facing text. Follow these style constraints consistently: Use 'agentengesteuerte KI' to describe CRM, as seen in pairs 1 and 3. Use 'Kundenerfolg' to describe customer success, as seen in pairs 1 and 4. Preserve established product terminology and non-translatable terms such as Salesforce, Agentforce, CRM.

glossaryItems.hint: Brand or product name - kept in source language
Brand or product name - kept in source language
Technical acronym - kept in source language

instructions.name: use-agentengesteuerte-ki-to-describe-crm
instructions.text: Use 'agentengesteuerte KI' to describe CRM, as seen in pairs 1 and 3.

instructions.name: use-kundenerfolg-to-describe-customer-su
instructions.text: Use 'Kundenerfolg' to describe customer success, as seen in pairs 1 and 4.

instructions.name: use-unified-platform-to-describe-salesfo
instructions.text: Use 'unified platform' to describe Salesforce, as seen in pairs 1 and 6.

instructions.name: use-customer-centric-to-describe-salesfo
instructions.text: Use 'customer-centric' to describe Salesforce, as seen in pairs 1 and 11.
